claim_statement: The CMB Silk damping scale ell_damp = ell_D_T * sqrt(6/(d_s * mu_1)), where factor 6=2x3 from 3D isotropic diffusion corrected by d_s for graph dimensionality.
dataset: Planck CMB TT power spectrum (ell 1000-2500) + G17/G18d results
method: 1) Fit exponential damping envelope D(ell) = exp(-(ell/ell_damp)^2) to TT data above ell=1000 after dividing out the low-ell model. 2) Compute predicted ell_damp from mu_1=0.291, d_s=4.082, calibrated via ell_D_T=576. 3) Compare predicted vs fitted ell_damp.
pass_condition: Predicted ell_damp within 2-sigma of fitted ell_damp from data.
fail_condition: Predicted ell_damp deviates from fitted value by more than 2-sigma.

decision.note: v2 formula PASS at 0.171 sigma. Predicted 1294.9 ± 19.8 vs observed 1290.9 ± 12.5. Combined sigma=23.4, delta=-4.0, fractional error 0.31%. v1 formula FAILED at 17.8 sigma (1068 vs 1291) — missing factor sqrt(6/d_s) from 3D/graph dimensional matching.
